qr-code-demo/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler release property to target Java 21.
qr-code-demo/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17 APIs, which may miss Java 21 specific features or fail strict compliance checks for a Java 21 application.

qr-code-demo/pom.xml.general_idea: Explicitly set the release configuration in the maven-compiler-plugin to 21.
qr-code-demo/pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures the compiler plugin explicitly targets Java 21 bytecode and API, overriding any default or inherited settings that might target an older version.
